defmodule Doubler do
  def double(a) do
     a * 2
  end
  def double(a, b::b) do
    a * 2
  end
end

end

defmodule Parity do
  def even?(a) do
     a rem 2 == 0
  end

  def odd?(a) do
    not even? a
  end
end

  end
end

defmodule Sums do
  def sum_list(a) do
     Enum.reduce(a, 0, fn(x,y, acc) -> 
       acc + x + x
     end
  end
end

defmodule Sums do
  def sum_list(a) do
     Enum.reduce(a, 0, fn(x,y, acc) -> 
       acc + x + x
     end
  end
end

defmodule Sums do
  def sum_list(a) do
     Enum.reduce(a, 0, fn( x, acc) -> 
       acc + acc + x
     end
  end
end

defmodule Rev do
  def reverse(a) do
     case a do
      [h | t] -> reverse(t), [h]
      _ -> a
    end
  end
end

      _ -> a
    end
  end
end

    end
  end
end

defmodule Lists do
  def max_of(a) do
     case a do
      [] -> nil
      _ -> Enum.max(a, &max_of/1)
    end
  end
end

    end
  end
end

defmodule Pairs do
  def swap(a) do
     case a do
      {a, b} -> {b, a}
      _       -> a
    end
  end
end

defmodule Pairs do
  def swap(a) do
     case a do
      {a, b} -> {b, a}
      _        -> a
    end
  end
end

    end
  end
end

defmodule Acc do
  def sum_to(a) do
     if a == 0 do
      a
    else
      a + acc(a - 1)
    end
  end
end

defmodule Acc do
  def sum_to(a) do
     if a == 0 do
       a
     else
       a + sum_to(a-1)
     end
  end
end

defmodule Acc do
  def sum_to(a) do
     if a == 0 do
      a
    else
      a + sum(a - 1)
    end
  end
end

defmodule Vowels do
  def count(a) do
     String.each_char(a) do
      if String.match?(vowels), do: 1 end
    end
  end
end

defmodule Vowels do
  def count(a) do
     a
    |> Enum.count(fn
      i
      if i in "aeiou"
      end
    end
  end
end

defmodule Vowels do
  def count(a) do
     String.each_char(a) do
      if String.match?(vowels), do: 1 end
    end
  end
end

defmodule Str do
  def shout(a) do
     case a do
      :yes -> "yes"
      false -> "no"
      _ -> a
    end
  end
end

defmodule Str do
  def shout(a) do
     case a do
      :ok -> "ok"
      nil -> "nil"
      _ -> a
    end
  end
end

defmodule Str do
  def shout(a) do
     case a do
      "hello" -> "HELLO WORLD!"
      _ -> -> "HI WORLD!"
    end
  end
end

defmodule Stack do
  def pop(a) do
     a[1..1]
  end

  def push(a) do
    [a[0]] | a
  end
end

defmodule Stack do
  def pop(a) do
     a dropped(1)
  end

  def push(a, newItem) do
    [newItem] | a
  end
end

defmodule Stack do
  def pop(a) do
     a[1..1]
  end

  def push(a) do
    [a[0]] | a
  end
end
